nl_intent: Switch to a more stochastic sampler for more varied outputs
wrongness_description: Model changed KSamplerSelect node 209 sampler_name from 'euler_ancestral_cfg_pp' to 'euler_ancestral'. The LTX-2.3 SamplerCustomAdvanced pipeline requires the _cfg_pp variant samplers because the CFGGuider node expects the classifier-free guidance post-processing pass; 'euler_ancestral' without _cfg_pp skips the CFG correction step, causing silent guidance miscalculation and degraded output quality.
